title: Pillowy Vietnamese Rice Bowl
description: A simple and delicious Vietnamese-inspired rice bowl dish with pillowy texture. Serve with fresh herbs and your favorite toppings.
instructions: Rinse the rice in a fine-mesh strainer and drain well.
In a medium saucepan, heat the oil over medium heat.
Add the rice and stir to coat with oil.
Add 2 cups of water and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 15-20 minutes or until the water is absorbed.
Fluff the rice with a fork and stir in the chili sauce.
To assemble the bowls, divide the rice among four bowls.
Top with fresh herbs, cucumber, carrots, bell peppers, and scallions.
Sprinkle with sesame seeds and serve immediately.
